ab: Inaak kaviaz tupaun tu Sipal, Bunun siduq aipa amin.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Sipal，他也是布農族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Sipal, and he is also an Bunun child.

ab: Muskun aam ihaan Bahuan asang vingkiu.
ch: 我們一起在馬遠村部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Bahuan tribe.

ab: Qanglas aam muskun tan’a madadaingaz paliqabasan, maqansiap aam malasBunun.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說布農族。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Bunun proficiently.

ab: Madaqvas aak amin tu maqulpiq, ma Sipal a maputis tu makuis.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Sipal很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Sipal is short and thin.

ab: Matamasaz a Sipal, amin mazima istaa.
ch: Sipal很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Sipal is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
